DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MASON LAROSA'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT HOANG PETER PHUONG'S ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - PLAINTIFF MASON LAROSA'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. MR. PHOUNG'S DEPOSITION SHALL TAKE PLACE IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA AND MUST BE COMPLETED ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 21, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; NOT REPORTED

APPEARANCES: John A. Noda, Esq. of Kern, Noda, Devine & Segal 474-1900 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
